About Saju Guide

Bridging ancient Korean wisdom with modern understanding

Our Mission

Korean Saju Guide was created by a dedicated team of cultural researchers, developers, and writers with a simple yet profound mission: to demystify the fascinating cultural tradition of Saju (사주) for an English-speaking audience, while maintaining strict historical and philosophical accuracy.

For too long, Eastern esoteric traditions have been either sensationalized as magical fortune-telling or oversimplified into generic daily horoscopes. We believe that Saju—the ancient system of Four Pillars—deserves to be explored, appreciated, and respected as a highly sophisticated, centuries-old framework for psychological profiling and self-reflection.

Our Editorial Standards & Expertise

Trust and accuracy (E-E-A-T) are the cornerstones of our platform. Our content is not AI-generated fluff or hastily translated material from unreliable sources.

  • Rigorous Research: Our guides are based on traditional texts and established conventions of the Sexagenary cycle, Yin-Yang theory, and Five Elements philosophy.
  • Algorithmic Precision: The algorithms powering our Saju Calculator and Compatibility Tool were built from the ground up to accurately calculate the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches based on the traditional lunisolar calendar conversions, adjusting accurately for timezones.
  • Psychological Empathy: We strictly avoid fear-mongering. We do not believe in "cursed" charts or fatalistic predictions. Every article is written with the goal of fostering self-acceptance and empathy.

What We Offer

Our platform provides free, accessible educational resources and interactive tools to help you explore your cosmic blueprint:

Interactive Tools

Calculate your personal Four Pillars chart or check relationship dynamics with our complex, client-side calculators.

In-Depth Guides

Explore deep, analytical articles explaining the mechanics of the Heavenly Stems, Earthly Branches, and the cultural context of Saju in modern Korea.

Our Commitment to Privacy

We understand that birth data is sensitive information. That is why Korean Saju Guide operates entirely on the client-side. When you enter your birth date and time into our calculators, the processing happens directly within your own web browser. We have no databases, we do not store your information, and we certainly do not sell it. Your privacy is absolute.

Important Disclaimer

For Entertainment & Self-Reflection Only

The content and tools on this website are provided for entertainment, cultural education, and personal reflection purposes only. They are not intended to provide professional advice of any kind—medical, legal, financial, psychological, or otherwise. Saju readings should not be used as the basis for important life decisions. We encourage you to enjoy exploring this cultural tradition while maintaining a healthy perspective on its role in modern life.

Contact Us

Have questions, suggestions, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Visit our Contact page to get in touch.

⚠️ Entertainment & Self-Reflection Only: The information provided on this site is for cultural education and entertainment purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical, legal, psychological, or financial advice.
